title: Calendar Views Filtered by Subitems in Mobile App
excerpt: I really, really wish my subitem filters would show up properly on the mobile app. I schedule multiple crew members via subitems under a specific job, and their calendar views do not show up properly in the app, nor do I…

posts.author: Veronica_Reimer (Veronica)
posts.cookedHtml:
I really, really wish my subitem filters would show up properly on the mobile app. I schedule multiple crew members via subitems under a specific job, and their calendar views do not show up properly in the app, nor do I have the option to filter by subitem in the app.

My team is constantly traveling/on the go and that’s why the usage of the mobile app is so important. The browser-version is not convenient enough for our crew members onsite.

THIS FEATURE WOULD HELP OUR WORKFLOW IMMENSELY. My company pays for many of my colleagues to utilize monday.com and I would hate to have to look elsewhere for a more intuitive app experience.
